description_long: This is a medium-sized, brown handbag with a simple, utilitarian design. The body of the bag is constructed from a soft, matte material that resembles suede or faux leather, with visible stitching along the seams for reinforcement. It features a single, wide strap that appears to be long enough for shoulder or crossbody wear, attached directly to the sides of the bag without visible hardware. The bag has a rounded, slightly tapered pouch with a subtle curve, and no visible external pockets or compartments. There are no decorative elements, logos, or patterns, giving it a minimalist and functional appearance. The closure mechanism is not visible, suggesting it may be a simple open-top or concealed magnetic snap.
description: A plain brown handbag with a wide, long strap and a soft, matte finish. Minimalist design with visible stitching and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: The front of the handbag shows the rounded pouch and the wide strap curving over the top, with visible stitching along the seam.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of the strap and the depth of the pouch, with the stitching detail more prominent.
description_view_2: The back of the handbag is visible, showing the continuous strap and the smooth, unadorned surface of the pouch.
description_view_3: A top-down view reveals the open, rounded shape of the pouch and the full loop of the strap.
attribute_strap_type: Single, long, wide strap suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear; non-adjustable; attached directly to the pouch sides.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Not visible; likely open-top or concealed magnetic snap.
